description: Explicit zero-plausible-gap proof whitelist for the SystemVerilog preprocessor formal-closure surface. RE-BASELINED 2026-05-18 (PGEN-SV-EXH-PROOF-0011, leaf SV-EXH-PROOF.2.3.2): allowed_unreachable_rules tightened [line_comment,trivia] -> [trivia], version 1 -> 2. The SV-EXH-PROOF.2.3.2 parser/EBNF-agnostic closed-loop generator correctness fixes (Mode-B structural-closer scoping + grammar-declared-sigil hazard gate + literal/probe-hint guard + line-terminator completeness; closed-loop parser_rejections 5/3 -> 0, gate-verified) legitimately change the path of the single deterministic syntax-probe sample (stimuli_seed=24001, stimuli_count=1) so that `line_comment` is now REACHABLE from entry. The observed gap-report unreachable_rule_debt is therefore exactly [trivia] (reason=unreachable_from_entry); unreachable_branch_debt is exactly the 3 trivia branches (branch::trivia::root/q#0..2, reason=unreachable_from_entry). This is a STRICT IMPROVEMENT of the unreachable surface (one fewer benign-unreachable helper rule) — tightening the whitelist to [trivia] makes the no-regression invariant STRICTER (a future regression making line_comment unreachable again is now caught). NOT masking: the genuine static-unreachable surface shrank; the whitelist is updated to the new, better, deterministic reality. Re-baselined per [[feedback_grammar_edit_proof_gate_lockstep]] (a generator change owns ALL its downstream proof contracts in-slice).
done_rule: Done requires a machine-checkable proof that all remaining syntax-unreachable debt is confined to the helper-only trivia pocket while the retained aggregate and reachability sidecars still show zero reachable parser/gap debt.
helper_only_whitelist_detail: SystemVerilog preprocessor zero-plausible-gap proof requires the syntax-unreachable surface to stay confined to the helper-only trivia pocket (`trivia` and its three branches) while the aggregate and reachability sidecars remain green.
